chunks.title: Call for Divine Vengeance
chunks.reason: An opening prayer invoking God's judgment on the wicked and describing their oppression of Israel.

chunks.title: God's Justice and Discipline
chunks.reason: A rhetorical argument asserting God's omniscience and the blessing of His discipline for the righteous.

chunks.title: Personal Trust in God's Refuge
chunks.reason: A personal declaration of trust in God as a helper and refuge against evildoers.
